description: Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.

userStories.title: Add backend logic to invite members
userStories.description: As a system, I need backend support to invite new members by email.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint accepts email for invitation
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add member invitation UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite members by email from the workspace UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Invitation form is visible
Form submission triggers the backend invitation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend logic to change member roles
userStories.description: As a system, I need backend support to update member roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint allows updating role to viewer, editor, or admin
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add role change UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member's role from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Role selection control is available for each member
Changing role updates the backend
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend logic to revoke access
userStories.description: As a system, I need backend support to revoke a member's workspace access.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint allows removing member access
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add revoke access UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke member access from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke access button/action is visible for members
Action requires confirmation and triggers the backend
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Record membership changes in audit log
userStories.description: As a system, I want to log all membership changes so that there is a history.
acceptanceCriteria: Schema/backend logs invite, role change, and revoke actions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Review audit log in settings UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see recent membership changes in the settings page.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit log view is visible in workspace settings
Shows recent membership changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
